name: Roquefort Meat Balls in Sour Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine ground beef, bread crumbs, roquefort cheese, chopped onion, salt, black pepper, egg, and milk or stock in a bowl.
2. Shape the mixture into 1 1/2 inch balls.
3. Heat shortening or salad oil in a pan over medium heat. Fry meatballs until lightly browned, about 3-4 minutes per side. Remove from pan and drain on paper towels.
4. Stir flour into the pan drippings. Mix until smooth.
5. Stir in water and cook until slightly thickened.
6. Add sour cream and cook only until hot; do not boil.
7. Add meatballs to the gravy and cook over very low heat only until hot.
8. Serve immediately over noodles or rice. Makes 4-5 servings.
